The Inquiry
Our Legacy

25 Years of Excellence

Since 1995, we have been crafting exceptional diamond jewelry, transforming the rarest stones into timeless masterpieces.

1995

Shree Giriraj Gems and Jewels was founded with a vision to create exceptional diamond jewelry.

2000

Established our signature manufacturing unit with master craftsmen.

2010

Expanded our collection to include international clientele and bespoke services.

2020

Launched digital presence while maintaining our handmade craftsmanship.

Present

Continuing our legacy with the same commitment to quality and artistry.

25+ Years
Our Philosophy

We Don't Just Create Jewelry

At Shree Giriraj, we believe that fine jewelry is more than an ornament—it's a legacy. Each piece we create is meant to be treasured, passed down, and worn with pride across generations.

Our approach combines traditional craftsmanship with contemporary aesthetics, ensuring every creation is both timeless and relevant.

The Artisans

Master Craftsmen

Our artisans have dedicated their lives to the art of jewelry making. Each brings unique expertise passed down through generations.

Ramesh Sharma

Master Setting Artist

25 years of expertise in micro-pavé and diamond setting

Kumar Mehta

Design Director

Translating visions into intricate designs for over 20 years

Vijay Singh

Polishing Expert

Ensuring every facet achieves mathematical perfection

The Process

From Rough Diamond to Masterpiece

search

1. Selection

Careful curation of the top 0.1% of global diamond yields

architecture

2. Design

Creating precise CAD designs that honor the stone

handyman

3. Crafting

Hand-finished by master artisans over weeks or months

verified

4. Certification

GIA/IGI certification and BIS hallmark for authenticity

diamond

5. Delivery

Presented in luxury packaging with lifetime support

security

Ethical Sourcing

Every diamond is traceable to its origin, ensuring conflict-free sourcing.

workspace_premium

GIA Certified

All diamonds come with internationally recognized GIA or IGI certification.

handshake

Lifetime Support

Complimentary cleaning, inspection, and upgrade options for life.

Experience Our Craft

Visit our atelier to witness the artistry firsthand.

Schedule a Visit
